sessions.notes: 7 yard doubles. Left and right arm single hand shooting

5 and 7 Yard doubles
7 yard moving targets

Doubles
Single bullet, re-load, reacquire target and take a second shot.

5 yard doubles
7 yard doubles
7 yard pseudo - draw, plus doubles
Doubles: working on recoil control. Starting to be able to shoot reactively.
doubles are starting to come. Sill over-pressing with my baby finger sometimes.

drills.name: Draw to First Shot
drills.notes: Figuring out Kestrel. Best Dry fire was .99. Averaging around 1.30.

maintenance.notes: Replaced springs in all magazines (6-month schedule).

drillLibrary.name: Bill Drill
drillLibrary.description: 6 shots from holster at 7 yards on USPSA target.

drillLibrary.name: El Presidente
drillLibrary.description: 3 targets, 6 shots, reload, 6 more shots at 10 yards.

drillLibrary.name: Mozambique / Failure Drill
drillLibrary.description: 2 to body, 1 to head from holster or low ready.

drillLibrary.name: Draw to First Shot
drillLibrary.description: Timed draws from holster to A-zone hit.

drillLibrary.name: Hackathorn Standards
drillLibrary.description: Multi-position practical drill.

drillLibrary.name: Match Stage
drillLibrary.description: USPSA / IDPA / steel match stage.
10 yards, 10 rounds, 10 seconds, B-8 target.

drillLibrary.name: Dot Torture
drillLibrary.description: 50 rounds on 10 dots, drills per dot.

drillLibrary.name: Wilson 5x5
drillLibrary.description: 5 yards, 5 shots, 5 seconds, from low ready.

drillLibrary.name: B-8 Standards
drillLibrary.description: Slow / timed / rapid fire on B-8 bullseye at varying distances.

drillLibrary.name: Triple Nickel
drillLibrary.description: 5 shots, 5 yards, 5-inch circle, 5 seconds.

drillLibrary.name: Strong-Hand Only
drillLibrary.description: Single-hand shooting with dominant hand.

drillLibrary.name: Weak-Hand Only
drillLibrary.description: Single-hand shooting with support hand.

drillLibrary.name: Slow Fire / Group Shooting
drillLibrary.description: Slow deliberate accuracy work.

drillLibrary.name: Cadence Drill
drillLibrary.description: Even-paced rhythm shots — splits work.

drillLibrary.name: Walk Back Drill
drillLibrary.description: Engage target, step back each successful round.

drillLibrary.name: Press Out
drillLibrary.description: Press out from compressed ready to first shot.

drillLibrary.name: One Reload One
drillLibrary.description: 1 shot, reload, 1 shot — par time.

drillLibrary.name: Reload Drill
drillLibrary.description: Practice reloads under time.

drillLibrary.name: Transition Drill
drillLibrary.description: Transition between 2+ targets, par time scored.

drillLibrary.name: Position Entry / Exit
drillLibrary.description: Drill entering and exiting shooting positions.

drillLibrary.name: Wall Drill
drillLibrary.description: Stand close to a wall, work trigger press without sight movement.

drillLibrary.name: Coin Drill
drillLibrary.description: Balance a coin on the front sight, dry fire without dropping it.

drillLibrary.name: Dry Fire Reload
drillLibrary.description: Reload practice with dummy/empty magazines.

drillLibrary.name: Index Drill
drillLibrary.description: Eyes-closed presentation, open and check natural point of aim.

drillLibrary.name: Dry Fire Draws
drillLibrary.description: Holster draws to first sight picture, par time.

drillLibrary.name: Five-Yard Roundup
drillLibrary.description: 5 yards, 5 strings of 5 shots in 2.5 sec each, B-8.

drillLibrary.name: Standard Practice
drillLibrary.description: General practice / freestyle / warm-up.

drillLibrary.name: Doubles 5yd
drillLibrary.description: Controlled pairs at 5 yards.

drillLibrary.name: Doubles 7yd
drillLibrary.description: Controlled pairs at 7 yards.

matches.name: SoCal Practical Shooters — Monthly Club Match
matches.notes: First match of the year. Strong on close targets, slow on distance. Stage 3 had a reload fumble that cost 4 seconds.

stages.name: Accelerator
stages.notes: Two C-zone hits on the movers hurt.

matches.name: SoCal Practical Shooters — Monthly Club Match
matches.notes: Better than February. More aggressive on movement. Still losing time on tight transitions.

stages.name: Classifier — 99-11 El Presidente
stages.notes: Ran this as the classifier for the match.

matches.name: Desert Sportsman Rifle & Pistol Club — Spring Level 2
matches.location: Desert Sportsman R&PC, Las Vegas NV
matches.notes: First Level 2. Long field courses. Heat was brutal — 92°F. Gun ran perfectly. Need to work on long-course stage planning.

stages.name: El Diablo
stages.notes: Complex stage with 4 positions. Slow but clean.

stages.name: Big Field — 32 Rounds
stages.notes: Longest stage. Two make-up shots on port 3 targets.

stages.name: The Gauntlet
stages.notes: Low ports were brutal on old knees.

stages.name: Texas Star + Hostages
stages.notes: Texas Star wasted 2 rounds. Hostage targets were fine.

matches.name: SoCal Practical Shooters — Monthly Club Match
matches.notes: Best club match so far. Faster draws, better stage planning. Edging toward B class. Need one more strong classifier run.

classifiers.notes: First El Prez run in competition. Turnaround was the limiter.
Clean run. Lost time on the draw.
Fast but two Charlies. Need to slow down slightly for cleaner hits.
Plates only — no paper scoring. Best percentage yet.

purchases.notes: I thought I lost my firing pin stop but Cari found it in the laundry. (For my EOS).
